title: Fit plan — does this album fit this song, and what could be done about it
description: Written by scripts/assessFit.mjs from photo count + music duration. Purely DESCRIPTIVE: it classifies the job and lists the options a person could choose between, but decides nothing (the decision, and who made it, lives in fit-decision.schema.json). This is the contract a UI reads to render the recommendation.

regime.description: How the album and the song relate.

preAnswered.description: True when the customer's own prompt already settled this (a music_mode/duration directive) — a UI should not ask again.

evidence.description: The numbers behind the regime, so a UI can show its reasoning rather than just its verdict.

targetPhotos.description: Photos that fill the song at a natural cut (~4s each).

feasibleBand.description: Photo counts that fit the song: fewer than min and the film crawls; more than max and montages cannot hold them all.

options.description: The choices to put in front of a person, most-recommended first. Empty when the job is balanced and no question exists.

consequence.description: What the film becomes if this is chosen — in the customer's language.

executable.description: True if a downstream node can carry it out unattended; false needs the customer to act (add photos, pick another song).
